entry.title: IDC N0001913D0007 (P00016) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF MODIFY E-1, INSPECTION AND ACCEPTANCE TERMS FOR CLINS 0X04 AND 0X05; MODIFY NAVAIR CLAUSE 5252.247-9521, PLACE OF PERFORMANCE FOR ENGINE OVERHAULS; MODIFY SECTION G, DFARS CLAUSE 252.232.7006, WIDE AREA WORKFLOW PAYMENT INSTRUCTIONS; AND CORRECT H-1 CLAUSE PARAGRAPH NUMBERING ERROR.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001913D0007 (P00019) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THIS MODIFICATION (1) AS OF THE EFFECTIVE DATE SPECIFIED IN BLOCK 3 OF THIS MODIFICATION (A) UPDATES THE CONTRACTING OFFICER IDENTIFIED UNDER CLAUSE 5252.243-9504 IN SECTION H AND (B) ADDS GOVERNMENT-FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP) BY (I) INCLUDING ATTACHMENT 23 IN SECTION J AND (II) UPDATING CLAUSE 5252.245-9500 ACCORDINGLY. (2) AS OF 1 JUNE 2016, REVISES ATTACHMENT 1 IN SECTION J.
IGF::CT::IGF

entry.title: IDC N0001913D0007 (P00021) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THIS ACTION INVOLVES UPDATES TO ATTACHMENT 1, 9, AND 22 UNDER THE CONTRACT. IT ALSO ENTAILS AN UPDATE TO CLIN 0101AD TO APPLY A CBA CHANGE THAT WAS OMITTED UNDER MODIFICATION P00017.
IGF::CT::IGF

entry.title: IDC N0001913D0007 (P00022) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IN ORDER TO FACILITATE THE TH-57 VHF RADIO/AUTOMATIC DEPENDENT SURVEILLANCE-BROADCAST AVIONICS UPGRADE MODIFICATION, THIS MODIFICATION IMPLEMENTS THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: (1) ADDS LINE ITEM 0423; 0424; 0425; 0426; AND, AS APPLICABLE, THE RESPECTIVE SUB-LINE ITEMS FOR EACH OF THESE LINE ITEMS. (2) ADDS IN SECTION C INFORMATION CORRESPONDING TO THE LINE ITEMS REFERENCED ABOVE. (3) UPDATES CLAUSE H-1 AND H-2 IN SECTION H. (4) UPDATES SECTION J BY (A) REVISING ATTACHMENT 1 AND (B) AND ADDING ATTACHMENT 25, 26, 27, AND 28.
IGF::CT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: IDC N0001913D0007 (P00023) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THIS ACTION IS FOR THE INSPECTION OF A DORMANT TH-57 AIRCRAFT FOR A DETERMINATION OF WHETHER TO RETURN IT TO AN ACTIVE STATUS. ADDITIONALLY, THIS ACTION IS FOR THE MAINTENANCE OF THAT AIRCRAFT DURING THE PERIOD BETWEEN THE INSPECTION AND THE DETERMINATION MENTIONED IN THE PRIOR SENTENCE.
IGF::CT::IGF
